I'm going to take a guess that the team that plays at Mackenzie Stadium is a team from the New South Wales Cup. I'm thinking of teams that play in the New South Wales Cup and are based in the Sydney area, and one team that comes to mind is the Western Suburbs Magpies. I'm going to take a chance and say that the team that plays at Mackenzie Stadium is the Western Suburbs Magpies, which is a team in the New South Wales Cup. </think>
<answer> New South Wales Cup </answer>
